questions: Does the patient show signs of GERD complications or other illness, or does not respond to therapy? (Yes/No)
Are treatment goals symptom control, healing esophagitis, and preventing recurrence/complications? (Yes/No)
Are symptoms not controlled by PPI therapy? (Yes/No)
Are there extraesophageal manifestations (respiratory, ENT, dental)? (Yes/No)
Is the patient a young patient? (Yes/No)
Is the patient compliant with medication? (Yes/No)
Is the patient a postmenopausal woman with osteoporosis? (Yes/No)
Does the patient have cardiac conduction defects? (Yes/No)
Is the cost of medical therapy a concern? (Yes/No)
